params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Page token returned from a previous list request.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter expression to narrow the results.

items.docs: Lists all integrations in the specified project, location, and product. Returns integration metadata including name and description.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

items.docs: Deletes an integration and all its versions. The integration must not have any active versions before deletion.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

items.docs: Executes an integration synchronously. The caller blocks until the integration execution completes or times out.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

items.docs: Schedules an integration for execution at a specified time. The execution happens asynchronously.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Page token returned from a previous list request.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter expression to narrow the results.

params.name: fieldMask
params.description: Fields to include in the response.

items.docs: Lists all versions of an integration. Returns version metadata including status, snapshot number, and creation time.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

params.name: newIntegration
params.description: Set to true to create a new integration and initial version.

items.docs: Creates a new version of an integration. A version contains the complete integration configuration including triggers, tasks, and parameters.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

items.docs: Gets the details for a specific integration version, including the complete configuration of triggers, tasks, and parameters.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

params.name: updateMask
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to update.

items.docs: Updates an existing integration version. Only draft versions can be updated.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

items.docs: Deletes an integration version. Active (published) versions cannot be deleted directly.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

items.docs: Publishes a draft integration version, making it the active version that receives new execution requests.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

items.docs: Unpublishes a published integration version, returning it to draft status so it no longer receives execution requests.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

items.docs: Downloads the complete configuration of an integration version as a JSON bundle.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

items.docs: Uploads an integration version configuration bundle, creating a new version.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Page token returned from a previous list request.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter expression to narrow the results.

items.docs: Lists all authentication configurations for the specified product. Auth configs define credentials used by integrations to connect to external services.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

items.docs: Creates a new authentication configuration. Auth configs store credentials like OAuth tokens, API keys, or service account keys.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

items.docs: Gets the details for a specific authentication configuration.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

params.name: updateMask
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to update.

items.docs: Updates an existing authentication configuration.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

items.docs: Deletes an authentication configuration. The auth config must not be in use by any active integration version.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Page token returned from a previous list request.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter expression to narrow the results.

items.docs: Lists all certificates for the specified product. Certificates are used for TLS/SSL authentication with external services.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

items.docs: Creates a new certificate for use with integrations that require TLS/SSL authentication.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

items.docs: Gets details for a specific certificate.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

params.name: updateMask
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to update.

items.docs: Updates an existing certificate.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

items.docs: Deletes a certificate. The certificate must not be in use by any active integration version.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Page token returned from a previous list request.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter expression (e.g., by status or time range).

items.docs: Lists execution results for an integration. Returns execution metadata including status, start time, and trigger information.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

items.docs: Gets details for a specific integration execution, including input/output parameters and execution steps.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Page token returned from a previous list request.

items.docs: Lists all suspensions for a specific execution. Suspensions pause execution flow pending human review or approval.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

items.docs: Lifts a suspension, allowing the paused execution to continue processing from where it stopped.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

items.docs: Resolves a suspension with a final decision, completing the suspended task in the execution.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Page token returned from a previous list request.

items.docs: Lists all Salesforce instances configured for the product.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

params.description: Product identifier (typically the Apigee product name).

items.docs: Lists all Salesforce channels configured for an SFDC instance.
